ranges.notes: Cold weather with temperatures often below freezing; festive atmosphere around New Year's and Orthodox Christmas (January 7) with some cultural events. Low tourist influx but many locals celebrate.
Typical midwinter cold with snow possible; many outdoor attractions less accessible. Quiet tourism with less events and shorter daylight hours.
Still cold but some indoor cultural events start gaining momentum; good for budget travelers and business visitors due to low prices and availability.
Cold and often snowy with temperatures around freezing; few tourists and attractions are less crowded but outdoor activities are limited.
Valentine's Day boosts couple visits and romantic events; cold weather persists. Indoor dining and cultural events are popular.
Gradual transition to early spring; some thawing starts; museums and indoor attractions good; budget-friendly season continues.
Early spring with increasing daylight and milder weather; some rain possible; outdoor sightseeing starts to improve.
Local celebration of spring and renewal with traditional crafts and events; pleasant weather encourages outdoor activities; moderate crowds.
Improving weather with mild temperatures; outdoor parks and cafes begin to open; good time for sightseeing before high season starts.
Spring in full bloom; comfortable temperatures and longer days; ideal for walking tours and outdoor dining; moderate crowds.
Major religious and cultural celebrations; vibrant local traditions and markets; excellent weather; higher crowds but rewarding experience.
Warm spring weather and blooming parks; outdoor cafes and events flourish; ideal for all traveler types; tourist season picking up.
Public holidays with parades and events; pleasant weather and lively atmosphere; great for cultural exploration but some crowds.
One of the best months weather-wise with warm temperatures and low rain; outdoor festivals and gardens at peak bloom; ideal for all travelers.

ranges.event: International Festival of Theatre and Other Arts (dates vary, often May)
ranges.notes: Cultural festival with performances across the city; great weather; vibrant atmosphere; attracts international visitors.
Start of summer, warm and sunny; great for outdoor activities, parks, and nightlife; some early summer tourists arrive.

ranges.event: George Enescu Festival (International Classical Music Festival, late August-early September, but sometimes events start earlier)
ranges.notes: June hosts early cultural events and concerts; warm weather; ideal for music lovers and cultural travelers; busy but manageable crowds.
High summer with hot weather; many outdoor festivals and events; city vibrant with tourists and locals; some heat waves possible.

ranges.event: Summer Well Festival (rock and indie music, mid-July, near Bucharest)
ranges.notes: Music festival attracting regional visitors; hot weather can be intense; vibrant nightlife and events; crowded and pricier accommodations.
Hot summer continues; some locals leave city for vacations reducing crowd density; good for cultural visits; occasional thunderstorms.

ranges.event: George Enescu Festival (late August to early September)
ranges.notes: World-renowned classical music festival draws international visitors; pleasant late summer weather; city vibrant and cultural life peaks.
Festival ends early September; mild weather with cooler evenings; excellent for sightseeing, wine events and outdoor cafes; moderate to high crowds.
Early autumn with warm days and cooler nights; fewer tourists than summer peak; good for cultural visits and outdoor dining.
Autumn colors in parks and gardens; cooler temperatures but still pleasant; fewer tourists; good for cultural events and museums.
Increasingly cooler and wetter weather; fewer outdoor events; indoor cultural attractions recommended; moderate to low crowds.
Chilly and often rainy; outdoor activities limited; low tourist numbers; good deals on accommodation; museums and indoor venues favored.
Increasingly cold, often foggy and rainy; low tourism; city feels quiet; great for budget travelers who prefer indoor cultural sites.
Cold weather but start of Christmas markets and festive lights; increasing tourist activity around holidays; some snow possible.
Festive atmosphere with markets and concerts; cold weather but lively and atmospheric; ideal for couples and families; crowds increase but manageable.
Major holidays with special events, parties, and cultural shows; cold but festive; high demand for accommodations; excellent for festive travelers.
